## XEventsTypes.UserClickedResultAddToCart property

The user has clicked on the add to cart button of a result. Payload: The [result](./x-types.result.md) that the user clicked.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
UserClickedResultAddToCart: Result;
```
